# Arlo Health

Virtual healthcare platform with MCP server for AI agents. Connects patients with licensed nurse practitioners for virtual consultations, diagnosis, and prescriptions.

## MCP Server

- Server: https://mcp.arlohealth.ai
- Discovery: https://mcp.arlohealth.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Documentation: https://mcp.arlohealth.ai/AGENTS.md
- Auth: OAuth 2.1 with PKCE

## Quick Start

1. Fetch server card: GET https://mcp.arlohealth.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
2. Authenticate via OAuth
3. Call MCP tools (start_healthcare_consultation, send_message, etc.)

## Links

- [Full Agent Guide](https://mcp.arlohealth.ai/AGENTS.md)
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://mcp.arlohealth.ai/openapi/arlo-health-mcp.yaml)
- [Website](https://www.arlohealth.ai)
